description: VC fund partner requests coffee meeting — multi-party (CC'd Sam)

input_email.subject: Coffee with a fan @ Avenir?
input_email.body:
Hi Henry, Sam,

Hope you're both doing well. Sophie here from Avenir. We're a multi-billion AUM growth fund running a high-conviction, concentrated portfolio of what we believe are category-defining companies (such as Ramp, Databricks, Physical Intelligence, Cognition, ShopMy etc.).

I lead our consumer AI work and am really interested in the product you're building at Fergana. Would love to grab a coffee if you're ever in the area.

notes: Investor outreach, not sales. Should propose specific times and location.

description: Counterparty confirms the proposed meeting time

input_email.subject: Re: Invitation: Coffee - Sophie Starck / Avenir x Fergana Labs
input_email.body: Yes, that sounds great - looking forward to it.

notes: Brief confirmation. Should recognize as confirmation and potentially create calendar invite.

description: Contact proposes wide time windows across two days

input_email.subject: Re: Chat about AI memory + onboarding to Ora
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Thanks for reaching out and for the note. Let's meet Wednesday 4/1 (1 - 6 PM PST) or Thursday 4/2. Happy to onboard you into Óra and discuss my approach to memory and building research into the application layer.

If there is anything more specific that you would like to discuss, send context on your objectives for the conversation and the goals of Fergana Labs.

Derek

notes: Proposes wide windows (1-6 PM) rather than specific slots. Should pick a specific time within the window.

description: VC GP cold outreach requesting coffee — multi-party (Henry + Sam)

input_email.subject: Mento.vc saying hi to Fergana Labs
input_email.body:
Hi Sam and Henry. Been following what you're building at Fergana Labs - really impressive. I'm a GP at Mento.vc. Would love to grab a coffee and chat if you're in town.

Alex Zhuravlev
General Partner

notes: VC outreach, not sales. No specific times proposed.

description: VC follow-up ping after no response

input_email.subject: Re: Mento.vc saying hi to Fergana Labs
input_email.body: Hi guys. Quick ping on this :)

notes: Follow-up nudge. Should still be classified as scheduling-related since original was a meeting request.

description: VC partner proposes 'same time but Thursday' — ambiguous time reference

input_email.subject: Re: Mento.vc saying hi to Fergana Labs
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

No worries on the delay at all! Next week works great for me too. How about same time but on Thursday?

notes: Ambiguous 'same time' reference — there was no previously agreed time. System should recognize ambiguity and propose a concrete time.

description: Counterparty requests earlier time slot for already-agreed meeting

input_email.subject: Re: Mento.vc saying hi to Fergana Labs
input_email.body: Any chance we can do 9am PT instead of 10am? 🥺

notes: Minor time adjustment request (10am -> 9am). Should check calendar and accommodate if free.

description: B2B sales rep from Ramp requesting meeting

input_email.subject: Henry & Sean / ferganalabs.com
input_email.body:
Hey Henry - Had a note to follow up in Q1, reaching out on behalf of Ramp where I work with companies like ferganalabs.com to help support scaling finance processes.

For context - Ramp unifies corporate cards, expense management, AP bringing your non-payroll spend onto one platform, hooking directly into your accounting system.

We work with 50k+ companies including the likes of Deel, Shopify, and Anduril, to help accounting and finance teams close their books up to 8x faster.

notes: Clear B2B sales outreach. Should be flagged as sales email.

description: Sales rep follows up with calendar booking link

input_email.subject: Re: Henry & Sean / ferganalabs.com
input_email.body:
Forgot to put this in my last email - here's the link to my calendar to book some time with me.

Let me know if you have any questions/thoughts on the above.

notes: Sales follow-up with scheduling link. Should still be flagged as sales.

description: Candidate needs to reschedule work trial due to midterm conflict

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Sorry for taking a while to get back to you! One of my professors postponed a midterm and it ended up conflicting with the March 25-27 dates. I really tried to get a makeup exam sorted out but the only option he gave me didn't work out, which is honestly why it took me so long to respond since I was trying to figure it out first.

Would it be possible to do the work trial in the April 15-30 window that I mentioned earlier? I'm totally flexible within that range so just let me know.

notes: Reschedule with explanation and alternative date window. Multi-message thread with prior context.

description: Candidate proposes available date ranges for work trial

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Thanks so much, really excited about this!

I can do anytime between March 25-30 and then April 15 onwards - just let me know what works best and I'll accommodate accordingly.

notes: Proposes wide date ranges rather than specific times. Multi-day scheduling, not a single meeting.

description: Candidate confirms rescheduled work trial dates

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Sounds great, I will go ahead and book the flights soon and send over the receipts. Thanks for being flexible, really appreciate it. Looking forward to April 15!

Best,
Priyadarshan

notes: Confirmation with action items (booking flights). Clear signal that dates are locked.

description: Candidate proposes multiple date ranges for work trial

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hi Henry and Samuel,

Thank you so much for extending the offer. I am so excited to work on the project!

1. Dates that work well: 3/8-3/10, 3/23-3/27, 4/5-4/7
2. References:
   Talon Meyer: Project Manager for Rippling Project last semester
   Ganesh Gopalakrishnan: Research Advisor for Summer 2024

notes: Multiple date range proposals in a structured format. Not a typical meeting but multi-day event scheduling.

description: Candidate requests shifting dates by one day due to daylight savings

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hey Henry,

Thank you for the details! One quick ask — would it be possible to shift to 3/9-3/11 (Sun-Tue) instead of 3/8-3/10? With the DST change happening on 3/8, I figured it might throw things off a bit. Let me know if that works!

notes: Minor date adjustment request (shift by 1 day). Specific reason given (DST change).

description: Candidate needs urgent call — competing offer deadline tonight

input_email.subject: Re: Fergana Labs Work Trial
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Thank you for getting back to me!

I am free starting from 7 pm today. When is a good time to meet?

Best,
Iana

notes: Time-sensitive scheduling — competing offer deadline. Gives availability window (7pm onwards today).

description: Cal.com automated booking confirmation

input_email.subject: 15 min meeting between Henry Dowling and Nadia Eldeib
input_email.body:
A new event has been scheduled.

What: 15 min meeting between Henry Dowling and Nadia Eldeib
When: Monday, March 16, 2026 | 9:00am - 9:15am (America/Los_Angeles)
Who: Henry Dowling - Organizer, Nadia Eldeib

notes: Automated booking confirmation from Cal.com. Should recognize as already-confirmed meeting, no action needed.

description: Meeting participant asks if now is still good to chat (at meeting time)

input_email.subject: 15 min meeting between Henry Dowling and Nadia Eldeib
input_email.body: Hi Henry! Is now still a good time to chat?

notes: Real-time check-in at meeting time. Not really scheduling — more of a meeting-start confirmation.

description: Third party confirms scheduled onboarding call with specific time

input_email.subject: Re: Trial 1st Week Follow Up - Dhiran Jamana
input_email.body:
Hi Henry and Sam,

I've scheduled the onboarding call for this coming Wednesday at 9 AM PST, and the calendar invite has been sent out. If this time doesn't work for you, please let me know and I'll find an alternative.

notes: Third-party coordinator confirming a time. Invite already sent — just informational.

description: Automated cancellation — candidate withdrew from interview process

input_email.subject: Canceled event with note: Turing: Fergana Labs Applied AI Engineer meeting with Desta
input_email.body: This event has been canceled and removed from your calendar with a note: "Hi Everyone, The meeting is canceled as the candidate has another opportunity. Thank you."

notes: Automated cancellation notification. No response needed.

description: AI assistant (Howie) confirms meeting removal, asks about rescheduling

input_email.subject: Re:
input_email.body:
Hi Henry,

Happy to help with this. I've removed the Stripe intro call on Thu, Mar 19 at 2pm PDT from your calendar. Would you like me to reach out to charleston.ebbes@growth.stripe.com to reschedule?

Please let me know if you need any other changes.

Best,
Howie
Assistant to Henry Dowling

notes: Another AI scheduling assistant confirming cancellation. Interesting edge case — agent-to-agent interaction.

description: Founder offers to hop on a call to help user with onboarding

input_email.subject: Re: how to install?
input_email.body: Oh also if you're open to it I'd love to just hop on a call for 5 min and help get you signed up. I'm free whenever, happy to work around your schedule

notes: Outbound from Henry offering a call. System sees this as a sent message — should track if Jack responds with a time.
